title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nature's Basket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nature's Basket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Nature's Basket:
Nature's Basket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket!
